summary:
The Permanent Maxillary Lateral Incisor has its mesiodistal measurement greater than cervical-incisal length due to significant growth post-puberty; no other tooth meets this criterion among those listed for consideration here. To directly answer your query:

The correct response based solely upon available information aligns perfectly with what was previously deduced – it must be the *permanent* maxillary lateral incisor given all criteria met uniquely by them alone amongst others mentioned herein.
